assumptions.description: The Testnet verifier APK and emulator trial are public-Testnet evidence only and cannot approve production release behavior.
required_evidence_to_clear: reviewer signoff and replacement evidence bundle

assumptions.description: Network binding is limited to the reviewed Testnet verifier run, endpoint digest, server_info digest, and network_id 1 observation.
Fresh account provenance is accepted only as reviewed categorical verifier evidence; no account address, seed, or credential material is retained.
required_evidence_to_clear: reviewed wallet provenance trace with allowed account identifiers redacted by policy

assumptions.description: Lifecycle action order is based on the reviewed operator UI trial, not on raw device automation logs or production telemetry.
required_evidence_to_clear: reviewer signoff and replacement evidence bundle

assumptions.description: The artifacts retain categorical outcomes, source digests, and redaction digests only; raw security material is intentionally excluded.
required_evidence_to_clear: reviewer signoff and replacement evidence bundle

assumptions.description: Raw payload JSON, request bodies, payload semantics, and digest-to-signed-byte reconstruction are outside this reviewed evidence set.
required_evidence_to_clear: reviewer signoff and replacement evidence bundle

assumptions.description: Native vault, biometric/passcode, keychain, and signing cryptography behavior is not proved by the reviewed Testnet lifecycle evidence.
Raw signatures, signed transaction blobs, and account identifiers are redacted and cannot be reconstructed from this model.
XRPL submission is modeled as UI submit categories only; node honesty, broadcast request material, mempool, queue, inclusion, and finality are not proved.
Replay, backend atomic single-use, duplicate submission, expiration enforcement, and conflict handling were not exercised by the reviewed trial.
Decline/refusal, cancellation, and expiry actions appear only as reviewed coverage gaps and are not modeled as successful runtime paths.
The verifier APK and emulator trace do not prove deployed production runtime equivalence.
Native Firebase packaging remains present; the trial may be described only as JavaScript-stubbed Firebase evidence, not fully Firebase-disabled runtime evidence.
required_evidence_to_clear: native Firebase-free APK proof or corrected label

assumptions.description: No source-derived fact is admitted into this Testnet model unless it is bound to a reviewed source, trial, or dependency artifact location.
required_evidence_to_clear: reviewed source-to-model trace map for every source-derived fact

claims.description: Reviewed verifier evidence binds the trial to XRPL Testnet network key TESTNET, network_id 1, and an allow-listed public Testnet endpoint digest.

evidence_refs.notes: Baseline Xaman claim registry used only as reviewed context.

claims.description: The trial records a fresh Testnet account boundary with no imported account, production account, credential, seed, or account material recorded.

evidence_refs.notes: Baseline Xaman claim registry used only as reviewed context.

claims.description: The captured categorical trace orders payload intake, review, and an authorized auth decision before the signing decision.

evidence_refs.notes: Baseline Xaman claim registry used only as reviewed context.

claims.description: The reviewed trace observes a signed signing decision, but raw signature bytes, signed transaction blobs, and native cryptographic correctness are intentionally not modeled.

evidence_refs.notes: Baseline Xaman claim registry used only as reviewed context.

claims.description: The reviewed trace observes categorical submit attempt and submit-result UI states only; it does not prove ledger broadcast, inclusion, queue, mempool, or finality.

evidence_refs.notes: Baseline Xaman claim registry used only as reviewed context.

claims.description: Payload intake is represented only as a redacted accepted category; raw payload JSON, intent semantics, and digest-to-signed-byte binding are not represented by the reviewed Testnet evidence.

evidence_refs.notes: Baseline Xaman claim registry used only as reviewed context.

claims.description: The decline/refusal path was not exercised in the reviewed trial and remains an explicit NOT_MODELED Testnet lifecycle boundary.

evidence_refs.notes: Baseline Xaman claim registry used only as reviewed context.

claims.description: The reviewed Testnet lifecycle trace does not exercise replay, duplicate submission, backend atomic single-use, or conflict behavior.

evidence_refs.notes: Baseline Xaman claim registry used only as reviewed context.

claims.description: Payload expiry behavior was not exercised in the reviewed trial and remains an explicit NOT_MODELED boundary.

evidence_refs.notes: Baseline Xaman claim registry used only as reviewed context.

claims.description: Cancellation behavior was not exercised in the reviewed trial and remains an explicit NOT_MODELED boundary.

evidence_refs.notes: Baseline Xaman claim registry used only as reviewed context.

claims.description: The trace records submit UI categories only; raw XRPL broadcast request, transaction blob, mempool, validated-ledger inclusion, and finality are NOT_MODELED.

evidence_refs.notes: Baseline Xaman claim registry used only as reviewed context.

claims.description: The model preserves only categorical lifecycle events, source digests, redaction digests, coverage-gap reason codes, and dependency artifact CIDs; it excludes raw payloads, credentials, account addresses, seeds, endpoints, and blobs.

evidence_refs.notes: Baseline Xaman claim registry used only as reviewed context.

entities.name: Xaman Testnet verifier APK and emulator trial

events.description: Redacted reviewed Testnet lifecycle action payload_intake.
Redacted reviewed Testnet lifecycle action review.

invariants.description: No raw payload, credential, account address, seed, endpoint, request body, server_info response, signature, or transaction blob is retained in the Testnet model artifacts.
The Testnet model remains production-blocking until runtime equivalence, raw-material-safe proof inputs, and gap coverage are reviewed.

canonicalization.algorithm: security-model-ir canonicalize_ir sort_keys separators sha256 fallback

not_modeled_records.reason: Raw payloads, request bodies, and transaction blobs were not recorded.
Raw signatures and signed transaction blobs were not retained.
The Testnet verifier run is not production runtime-equivalence evidence.
The reviewed lifecycle event list has no replay or duplicate-submit exercise.
Cancellation is present only as a not-exercised reviewed coverage gap.
Expiry is present only as a not-exercised reviewed coverage gap.
The report cannot reconstruct transaction blobs and does not prove XRPL broadcast, inclusion, or finality.
Refusal/decline is present only as a not-exercised reviewed coverage gap.

policies.name: Testnet model cannot approve production release
Retain only redacted categorical lifecycle evidence
Reject ambiguous mappings and unreviewed source-derived facts
